basics.label: Software Developer
basics.quote: Two steps back, one step forward.
basics.name: Raúl Correia
basics.summary: Pragmatic software developer with 3+ years industry experience specializing in web applications, middleware, sdk development and concurrent software. As native of Porto, Portugal, I enjoy karaté, computer games, cycling, traveling and a eternal tinkerer at heart.

work.summary: Backend developer for Core Onboarding product. A serverless, multi tenant platform, that performs KYC/KYB.
highlights: Re-engineered integration tests written by QA team to a generic framework, making it easier to capture new business requirements, target multiple environments and automated features validation per customer configuration.
Introduced the concept of personal development environments to the Onboarding product, allowing multiple developers to work concurrently.

Developed dynamic configuration module, allowing inferring values based on a template and customer configuration files. Removing human errors and making runtime, deployment and integration-tests configuration composable and seamless.
Automated CI/CD pipelines with concurrent tenant deployment, testing and reporting.
Migrated Serverless framework to CDK, resulting in a seamless tech stack across teams, maintainable IoC, easy deployment and allowing new features to be developed.

work.summary: Backend developer and minor Software Architect role for [**Ostate**](https://omrt.tech/ostate/), a parametric tool to generate architectural buildings.
highlights: Re-engineered and re-architected Ostate to capture new business requirements.
Automated CI/CD pipelines for E2E frontend testing.

work.summary: Developer on Web team, researching and developing Uniface solutions to modern standards.
highlights: Integrated new logic E2E from a low code platform, HTML, Database, to C++ interaction on Backend.

work.summary: Developer on main CMF Product, MES.
highlights: Successfully migrated the main CMF Product from legacy code base to next gen implementation.
Re-engineered a module for highly regulated fields like medical devices or weighing tools.
Successfully developed an SDK to interact with payment terminals
Worked on multi threaded, event oriented architecture.
Implemented multiple network protocols with different paradigms, sync, async, like TCP, UDP, RS232, HTTP.
Implemeted layers of resilience and fault tolerance on top of networking protocols.

education.institution: Instituto Superior de Engenharia do Porto

awards.title: Cum laude
awards.awarder: Informatics Engineering, Instituto Superior de Engenharia do Porto
